reasoning: As of late October 2025, the market odds (from Polymarket) assign OpenAI roughly a 12-13% chance of having the top model on Chatbot Arena by December 31, 2025. Google is heavily favored at around 77%, likely driven by the anticipation and performance of latest-generation Gemini models (e.g., Gemini 3.0) and the fact that Google wins in a tie-breaker over OpenAI due to alphabetical naming. In contrast, OpenAI's previous major models (like the Orion release from late 2024 or early 2025) are seemingly facing stiff competition, and unless OpenAI issues a major surprise model release in the last two months of the year, they are unlikely to unseat Google. Aligning with the market consensus, the probability is approximately 13%.
batch_queries: Will OpenAI have the top AI model on December 31?
